---
title: "John Cornelius Moberly"
---

## John Cornelius Moberly

**Dates:** (b.1848)

### Description

fourth son of the Rt. Rev. George Moberly, solicitor

### Biography

He married (1872) Caroline Hunter.

### Letters

- Letter from June 1855.
- Letter from [summer 1855]
- Letter from [July 1853]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
